case_title: BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. VS. ZHUOWEI YAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-22-2022 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $373.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 210005692) AS TO DEFENDANT YAN, ZHUOWEI
DECLARATION RE: FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 210005692) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YAN, ZHUOWEI $4,669.97 PRINCIPAL, $373.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,043.47, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 210005692)
